en.question: A sum of money doubles itself in 8 years at simple interest. In how many years will it become 5 times itself?
en.explanation: To double, SI = P. P = P x R x 8 / 100, giving R = 12.5%. To become 5 times, SI = 4P. 4P = P x 12.5 x T / 100, so T = 400/12.5 = 32 years.

hi.question: कोई राशि 8 वर्ष में साधारण ब्याज पर दोगुनी होती है। 5 गुना होने में कितने वर्ष?

en.question: The difference between CI and SI on Rs 15,000 for 2 years at 10% per annum is:
en.explanation: CI - SI for 2 years = P x (r/100)^2 = 15000 x 0.01 = Rs 150.

hi.question: ₹15,000 पर 2 वर्ष का 10% वार्षिक CI और SI का अंतर?

en.question: A sum becomes Rs 6,600 in 4 years and Rs 7,200 in 6 years at simple interest. Find the principal.
en.explanation: SI for 2 years = 7200-6600 = Rs 600. SI for 1 year = Rs 300. SI for 4 years = Rs 1200. Principal = 6600-1200 = Rs 5400.

en.question: Find the compound interest on Rs 10,000 at 20% per annum compounded half-yearly for 1.5 years.
en.explanation: Rate per period = 10%, periods = 3. Amount = 10000 x (1.1)^3 = 10000 x 1.331 = Rs 13,310. CI = Rs 3,310.

hi.question: ₹10,000 पर 20% वार्षिक, अर्धवार्षिक चक्रवृद्धि, 1.5 वर्ष का CI?
